candidates.why: Direct total revenue/top-line row; matches REVT exactly and equals Net sales in the preview.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Explicit consolidated cost of sales / COGS line; preferable to underlying subcomponents because it captures full direct production/service costs without needing summation.
Only a partial component of cost of sales in older years, not the full COGS amount.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Used the explicit full COGS line rather than a partial component.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component; use the top-level row rather than its labor/other subcomponents to avoid double counting.
Clear SG&A overhead component; use the top-level row rather than its labor/other subcomponents to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Research and development costs recognised as expenditure
candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating income. Included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per PROF rule.
Mixed bucket that appears to include impairments/reorganization and other non-SG&A items; excluded to avoid contamination.

candidates.row_label: Expenses from employee benefits by function:
candidates.why: Functional employee-benefit subtotal likely spans multiple functions including COGS; excluded to avoid overlap and misclassification.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. No explicit combined SG&A row exists. Chose the clean overhead components and included the separate above-EBIT R&D line in XSGA as required so that XSGA-XRD nets out R&D.

candidates.row_label: Research and development costs recognised as expenditure
candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line located above operating income/EBIT; best match for XRD.
Generic R&D label exists but appears unused in preview; lower priority than the more specific reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Research and development costs recognised as expenditure

variables.notes: Priority list uses the specific above-EBIT R&D line first.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense on borrowings; strongest match for XINT.
Recurring financing cost related to leases; include alongside other interest expense components.
Likely recurring finance-cost bucket; include since no broader net finance total is being used and this can capture residual recurring financing costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest row; excluded to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the value of interest rate swaps for cash fow hedges - transfer from other
candidates.why: Derivative/hedge valuation-related item, not core recurring interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded FX/derivative valuation items and supplemental duplicates.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure excluding non-controlling interests, which aligns with BE + MIB framework.
Broader total equity includes non-controlling interests, so it is inferior when an owner/parent equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Standard balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent alternative label for the same concept; use as fallback priority.

variables.notes: Priority list captures the balance-sheet minority interest label across possible naming changes.
